title: XMod Additions
description: A Vanilla+ Mod that adds in a collection of recipes, items, mobs, dimensions, biomes and the like to help improve the experience and provide some more late-game opportunities
body:
**Welcome to XMod Additions! This mod adds in a number of useful items and features to help improve the quality and extensiveness of the game. Think of this as a sort of "Vanilla+" mod.**

This mod adds in a total of 218 mod elements, including over 80 new recipes, a new dimension, a handful of new mobs, new armor, swords and other tools and combat items, as well as additional items that may aid you on your journey.

This mod was created _MANY_ years ago, and is my first ever mod. I am uploading it here because somehow it continues to gain some interest, and thought it might be nice to put it on the same place that my spiritual successor to this project, XMod Additions XL, currently resides.

There is a lot in this mod, and frankly, not all of it is explained as well as it should be. However... it has been many years since I made this project. I no longer have the source files to make updates or bug fixes, so sadly it must remain as-is. However, I am still proud of what I accomplished, and I hope you can still have a lot of fun from this decently expansive project.

For all the details about the mod specifically, check out the Curseforge Link below:

[Link to original CurseForge page for full mod details](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xmod-additions)
